query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS conferences (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  meeting_type ENUM('huddle','meeting','conference','webinar','broadcast','workshop') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'meeting',
  platform ENUM('rrb_builtin','zoom','google_meet','discord','skype','rrb_broadcast') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'rrb_builtin',
  host_id INT,
  host_name VARCHAR(255),
  room_code VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  external_url TEXT,
  scheduled_at BIGINT,
  duration_minutes INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 60,
  max_attendees INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 100,
  password VARCHAR(255),
  closed_captions BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  recording BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  status ENUM('scheduled','live','ended','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'scheduled',
  attendee_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);
